title: dryopteris fuscipes var. inuyamensis
intro: Dryopteris fuscipes var. inuyamensis is a variant of the Dryopteris fuscipes species, a type of fern native to Japan. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Traditionally, Dryopteris fuscipes var. inuyamensis is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
